The Oosawa/Knowles theory is well-established from my domain knowledge: the half-time t½ ~ m0^(-γ) where γ relates to nucleation reaction orders, and the apparent rate constant κ ~ m0^γ. This is exactly the breakthrough idea. Let me implement it.

The key insight: a pure logistic `c*(plateau - c)` with rate `k_eff = c0² · m0^c1 · (1 + c2²·M0)` plus a nucleation source `c3²·m0^c4·(plateau - c)` to break the c=0 fixed point. The m0 power law repositions onset analytically.

Instead I'll keep it pure logistic as the idea specifies (6 constants) since over-parameterizing regressed before. Let me implement exactly the breakthrough with 6 constants.
